ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the bike's location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the bike's location */,
  "is_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bike is disabled (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "is_reserved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bike is reserved (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the bike is located */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "qr_code" TEXT /* Unique QR code for scanning */,
  "last_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bike is electric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of bikes at the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the station is currently open */,
  "public_transport_integration" TEXT /* Integration with public transport (e.g., bus stop, subway station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Preferred payment methods */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user renting the bike */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the rental */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental ended */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the rental */,
  "is_one_way" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rental is one-way */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total payment amount */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work done */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments regarding their experience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is public */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue reported in the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, maintenance) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the admin who generated the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
